programmes.show_description: MV Bianca And Bryony Hollands. Judge Rinder examines a police attempt to intercept a record-breaking shipment of cocaine. Plus, he looks at a drunk-driving incident. S3, Ep7
Joshua Davies. 16-year-old Joshua Davies was sentenced to 14 years in jail for the murder of his on-off girlfriend. Why did he kill - and only confess to it in prison? S1, Ep5
Laundrette Killers. In 2013, Sean McHugh, went to a laundrette in Anfield, Liverpool to do his washing, only to be stabbed by a teenage gang. What made them kill an innocent man? S1, Ep6
Murder On VHS. In 1994, a night out in Miami turns deadly for two women and a nightclub owner. Investigators rely on a hidden home video camera to solve the mystery. S8, Ep13
Double Identity. In 2018, 59-year-old Pamela Hutchinson is found dead in her Florida condo. The search for answers leads police to a mysterious woman spotted on CCTV. S8, Ep14

Stolen Identity. A woman, Betty, identifies a dead body as her missing sister Annie - but Annie is still alive. A look at murderers who kill to acquire a new identity. S6, Ep4
Texas Rangers. Examines the history and modern evolution of the Texas Rangers, who were formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against attacks from natives. S3, Ep11
Fateful Crossing. When an officer dies in the line of duty, the fraternity of law enforcement bands together to make sure that justice is brought to those responsible. S5, Ep17
Deadly Influence. Following the FBI investigators, special agents and detectives as they solve some of the toughest cases. S5, Ep18
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep2
A Deadly Divorce. Chris and his wife are going through a divorce so nasty it's the talk of the town. Proceedings turn deadly when she discovers her Chris' affair with his secretary. S1, Ep2
Mountain Of Mystery. On May 5th, 2020, family man Dahvonte Morgan disappears in the mysterious town of Mt. Shasta. As his family searches, they become suspicious of his girlfriend. S11, Ep2
Someone To Watch Over Her. On a cold winter night, a mother doesn't return home from work. As dawn breaks, her body is found in a churchyard. Will CCTV footage reveal the killer? S2, Ep13
Flowers In The Lake. When Leesa Nascimento is killed by a shot in the head, a recently sacked co-worker, is traced after evidence is found that ties him to the murder. S2, Ep6
Off-Camera. A video blogger posts every detail of her life online. One night, intruders break in her home and kill her husband. Will her endless videos provide a clue as to why? S3, Ep10
Out Of Frame. When Beverly Thompson is found bludgeoned to death in her own home, no one suspects her family. Detectives are puzzled, until CCTV footage reveals someone is lying. S3, Ep12
Edge Of Fourteen. 13-year-old Ashley Summers is fun-loving teenager, but trouble brews when she starts keeping secrets. When she disappears from home, is she just another runaway? S9, Ep1
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep3
We Never Fight. A family want answers when their 23-year-old daughter goes missing after a night out. Can security camera footage help detectives hunt down the person responsible? S6, Ep6
I Still Hear Their Screams. After Felisha marries Wesley, she discovers he is selfish and unkind. When she finally leaves him, he exacts the cruellest revenge. S10, Ep14
The Grudge. A doctor's assistant and part-time model attracts her fair share of admirers. But one encounter sparks a devastating and fatal sequence of events. S6, Ep11
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep2
The Murder Of Ellie Gould. When a 17-year-old girl was attacked and murdered in her Wiltshire home, her killer was until the day before her boyfriend. What made him turn killer? S2, Ep1
The Murder Of Jodie Chesney. A 17-year-old girl was out with friends in an East London park when she was stabbed by unknown assailants. Fatally, it was a case of mistaken identity. S2, Ep2
Ticket To Murder. In Dalton, Georgia, a convenience store employee is stabbed at work. Security footage reveals a disturbing revelation about the killer's identity. S8, Ep15
I Will Follow. In 2016, a young mum of two is brutally shot to death in her home. When police arrive on the scene, they suspect someone close to the victim. S8, Ep16

Unlikely Sources. How baffling crimes have been solved through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles and other seemingly meaningless objects. S3, Ep13
Not Forgotten. A man risks everything to find his sister's killer - can a sympathetic detective with a great theory help him? Plus, a sexual predator is getting away with murder. S6, Ep10
Voice of Terror. In the late 1970s, the FBI had knowledge of anti-Castro terrorists operating in the US. Then, a new group appeared, more violent than their predecessors. S7, Ep1
Dangerous Case. In the late '70s, a terrorist group is suspected of setting off bombs in major US cities. Their goal: to bring attention to the Puerto Rican independence movement. S7, Ep2
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep3
Sex and the Married Man. A married man starts a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret. S2, Ep2
Love And Lies In Idyllwild. On June 6th, 2020, in the Idyllwild community of California, Dia Abrams tells her partner she will feed the horses and is never seen or heard from again. S11, Ep3
Captured On Camera. A 22-year-old nursing assistant vanishes. When police check the local CCTV footage, they discover that Carlesha Freeland-Gaither was abducted right on camera. S3, Ep1
Rahim Mohammadi. The shocking discovery of 80-year-old Lea Adri-Soejoko's body in a shed unravels a tragic story. Detectives and her family recount the steps that led to her murder. S1, Ep2
An Open Relationship. On New Year's Eve, Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, mysteriously vanishes. The discovery of a shallow grave leads to the emergence of a horrific truth. S4, Ep2
Looks Can Kill. Rebecca Thudin was a successful, driven woman who seemed to live the perfect life. But, after meeting an older man at the gym, her life takes a dramatic turn. S4, Ep6
Last Stop. When 13-year-old Tabitha Tuders vanishes, police suspect she's a runaway. But disturbing circumstances behind her disappearance leaves her family desperate for the truth. S9, Ep8
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep4
No Place Like Home. A young professional is murdered in her apartment in Orlando. Detectives turn to CCTV footage to solve the case and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice. S6, Ep8
The Final Cut. After the stabbing of hairstylist-to-the-stars Fabio Sementilli, a trail of passion and greed exposes a killer who sends shockwaves as far as Canada. S9, Ep12
Feared Silent. After a call on Friday the 13th, José Herran vanishes. As police dig in, they find a town where fear reigns, pain is ritual, and horror thrives. S1, Ep6
